scripts.dev:tauri: cd apps/tauri && bun run tauri dev
scripts.build:tauri: cd apps/tauri && bun run tauri build
scripts.build:tauri:linux-x64: cd apps/tauri && bun run tauri build --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
scripts.build:tauri:linux-arm64: cd apps/tauri && bun run tauri build --target aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu
scripts.build:tauri:macos-arm64: cd apps/tauri && bun run tauri build --target aarch64-apple-darwin
scripts.build:tauri:macos-universal: cd apps/tauri && bun run tauri build --target universal-apple-darwin
